# Economy Scoring: Bonuses for exploiting market conditions (as decimal multipliers)

economyScoring.# excessBonusMax: Max 5% bonus for buying from markets with excess supply
economyScoring.# deficitBonusMax: Max 7.5% bonus for selling to markets with deficit demand
economyScoring.# disruptionBonus: 20% bonus for selling to disrupted/blockaded markets

# Market Impact Penalty: Penalty for over-trading the same routes

impactPenalty.# maxPenalty: Max 50% penalty when route is heavily over-traded

# Auto-Resupply: Automatic supply/fuel refilling at buy markets

resupply.# minProfitBuffer: Only resupply if total profit exceeds this amount
resupply.# suppliesThreshold: Resupply when supplies drop below this fraction of capacity
resupply.# suppliesTarget: Refill to this multiple of threshold
resupply.# fuelThreshold: Resupply when fuel drops below this fraction of capacity
resupply.# fuelTarget: Refill to this fraction of max fuel

# Trade History: How much trade history to track and display in intel

history.# maxSize: Maximum number of trades to keep in history
history.# displayCount: Number of recent trades to show in intel panel

fleetBehavior.# tradeModDuration: Days that market trade impact persists
fleetBehavior.# arrivalDistance: Distance in units to consider 'arrived' at market
fleetBehavior.# taskTimeLimit: Prevents Nexerelin from expiring the auto-trade task
